raw_title: Book Review: ‘Homesick for a World Unknown,’ by Miriam Horn
book_title: ‘Homesick for a World Unknown,’ by Miriam Horn
description: In her engaging, lyrical “Homesick for a World Unknown,” Miriam Horn tells the story of the famed naturalist George Schaller.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘If This Be Magic,’ by Daniel Hahn
book_title: ‘If This Be Magic,’ by Daniel Hahn
description: The translator Daniel Hahn makes the case that Shakespeare can be appreciated “even if we don’t hear a single one of his words.”

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Radiant Dark,’ by Alexandra Oliva
description: In “The Radiant Dark,” life is upended after humanity receives a signal from a distant planet. But extraterrestrial contact takes a back seat to more earthly problems.
